summary: Comprehensive testing of homepage backend API integration. All features working correctly: /api/homepage/data returns all required data (national_stats, state_counts, featured_centers, faqs, top_states, data_year). Frontend components (TrustIndicators, LocationsSection, DynamicFeaturedCenters) display data from backend correctly. Fixed a bug where featured centers were not showing state names.
seed_data_creation: Database already seeded with 51 states, 8 featured treatment centers, and FAQs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage API integration fully tested. The /api/homepage/data endpoint returns all required data in a single optimized call. Frontend components correctly display: national stats (12.2M Americans Affected, 13K Treatment Centers, 42.2% Avg Recovery Rate, 2.1M Treatment Admissions), 51 state cards with treatment center counts, 8 featured treatment centers, and 'View All 51 States' button.

api_homepage_data.details: Returns all required keys: national_stats, top_states, featured_centers, faqs, state_counts, data_year

state_counts.details: Returns 51 states sorted by treatment centers (CA: 1,578, TX: 1,196, FL: 887, NY: 785, etc.)

featured_centers.details: Returns 8 featured treatment centers with ratings, treatment types, insurance info

trust_indicators_section.details: Displays 4 national stat cards: Americans Affected (12.2M), Treatment Centers (13K), Avg Recovery Rate (42.2%), Treatment Admissions (2.1M)

locations_section.details: Displays 16 state cards with treatment center counts, map, search functionality, and 'View All 51 States' button

dynamic_featured_centers.details: Displays 8 featured treatment center cards with images, ratings, treatment types, and contact info

view_all_states_button.details: Button present with text 'View All 51 States'

featured_centers_state_name.issue: Featured center cards were showing only city name without state (e.g., 'Detroit,' instead of 'Detroit, Michigan')
featured_centers_state_name.root_cause: API returns 'state_name' field but frontend component was using 'state' field
featured_centers_state_name.fix: Updated DynamicFeaturedCenters.tsx to use 'center.state_name || center.state' and updated TypeScript interfaces in both component and api.ts
